title: Deploy 30K agent system to Raspberry Pi Octavia
description: Setup ssh octavia (192.168.4.38) with: (1) AI accelerator + NVMe optimization, (2) 30K agent orchestration containers, (3) Load balancing across aria/alice/lucidia, (4) Backup sync to shellfish droplet, (5) Real-time metrics to OS dashboard. Octavia has AI accelerator hardware.
